source: arXiv:2512.12157 / github.com/mcmulaz/Super-Sym 'Garden Algebra' Mathematica code, evaluated numerically

relations.bosonic: L_I R_J + L_J R_I = 2 delta_IJ I_82
relations.fermionic: R_I L_J + R_J L_I = 2 delta_IJ I_176 + 2 E_IJ

provenance.paper_title: 10D Supergravity Numerical Data Sets for L & R Matrices
provenance.content_hash_note: Canonical content hash is canonical_token_hash() in src/tendim_data.rs (symbolic-token hash, prefix 'TENDIM-TOKENS-v1;'), NOT the raw-byte JSON SHA256. The raw_json_sha256_pre_metadata value is informational and predates adding these provenance fields.
provenance.license_note: Upstream repo has NO LICENSE file at commit 8c8df92. This is an academic regeneration of the authors' published generative Mathematica (Garden Algebra), provided with full citation for reproducibility; not a redistribution of a licensed dataset.
provenance.known_mismatch: UNRESOLVED worked-example discrepancy. The paper's DISPLAYED worked examples in Eq 6.0.5 (and, per adversarial review, the gravitino psi examples in Eq 6.0.6) disagree with the Garden Algebra source and this JSON: bracketed spinor indices differ (e.g. Q_1 h_11 -> psi_1(6) in the paper vs psi_1(16) here) and some coefficients differ (e.g. paper i/16 where the assembled value here is 7/16, possibly a primitive-vs-assembled presentation difference). This JSON faithfully reproduces the Garden Algebra source (verified by an exact sympy re-derivation: 0 entrywise mismatches, exact bosonic Garden closure). Whether the Garden source matches the paper's intended matrices, or the displayed examples contain transcription errors, is NOT established and needs the authors. No typo claim and no paper-fidelity claim is made.
provenance.gen_script_sha256_note: Compute the current generator hash with: shasum -a 256 scripts/gen_10d_data.py (not pinned here; the script is edited over time).
